resultList.dtldesc: Discover a sophisticated living experience in the heart of Sector 150, Noida, with this elegant 3 BHK apartment. Situated in one of the most sought-after and greenest pockets of the city, this residence is designed for those who value a blend of modern luxury and natural serenity. The property offers a refined lifestyle within a meticulously planned gated community, ensuring both privacy and a vibrant social environment for its residents.Property SpecificationsThis spacious apartment encompasses a well-defined carpet area of 1,285 sq. ft and is positioned on the middle floor of a magnificent twenty-eight-storey tower. The layout is thoughtfully crafted to maximise space and functionality, featuring three well-proportioned bedrooms and three modern bathrooms. The residence boasts four private balconies that provide refreshing views of the lush green surroundings and the internal landscaped gardens. The apartment is unfurnished, allowing the new owners the creative freedom to design their dream interiors from scratch. High-quality vitrified tiling flows throughout the living spaces, while the north-east facing orientation ensures the home is bathed in natural light and remains well-ventilated throughout the day.FacilitiesThe project is equipped with an extensive array of world-class facilities designed to cater to every lifestyle need. Residents benefit from two dedicated covered parking spaces, ensuring the safety of their vehicles. The building features high-speed lifts, 24x7 treated water supply, and 100 power backup for uninterrupted comfort. Security is a top priority, with a multi-tier system including CCTV surveillance and manned security personnel. The clubhouse offers premium leisure options, including a swimming pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, and indoor sports facilities. Additionally, the complex includes beautifully manicured parks, jogging tracks, and dedicated play areas for children, all set within a low-density environment.LocalitySector 150 is widely regarded as the Greenest Sector of Noida, offering an unparalleled living environment with vast open spaces and parks. The locality enjoys seamless connectivity via the Noida-Greater Noida Expressway and the Yamuna Expressway, making commutes to Delhi and international airports effortless. Reputed educational institutions such as GD Goenka Public School and leading healthcare facilities like Yatharth Super Speciality Hospital are within close proximity. The neighbourhood is also home to upcoming commercial hubs and retail centres, providing easy access to shopping and dining. With the Noida Sector 148 Metro Station just a short drive away, the area combines the peace of a suburban retreat with the convenience of urban living.

resultList.dtldesc: This ready-to-move 2 BHK apartment in Antriksh Golf View 2, Sector 78, Noida offers a comfortable blend of space, convenience, and modern living. Located in one of Noida's well-connected residential sectors, the project enjoys proximity to schools, hospitals, shopping destinations, and metro connectivity, making it a desirable address for homeowners and investors alike.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment features two spacious bedrooms and two well-designed bathrooms. The property enjoys a north-east facing orientation, which allows good natural light and ventilation throughout the day.::::Facilities::::Residents benefit from one covered and one open car parking space, ensuring ample parking convenience. Antriksh Golf View 2 is a large residential development with multiple lifestyle amenities and family-friendly facilities.::::Locality::::Sector 78 is a rapidly developing residential hub with excellent connectivity to major parts of Noida and Delhi NCR. Reputed schools, hospitals, supermarkets, and daily convenience stores are located within approximately 4 km of the property. Its strategic location, established social infrastructure, and growing residential demand make it an attractive destination for both end-users and investors.

resultList.dtldesc: This spacious 3 BHK apartment, situated in the rapidly developing Sector 89 of Gurgaon, offers a sophisticated living experience for those seeking a modern home in one of the citys most promising residential corridors. It includes three well-proportioned bedrooms, each designed to serve as a quiet retreat, and three modern, high-spec bathrooms. The central living and dining area is bright and expansive, creating an inviting atmosphere that is well-suited for both family life and social entertainment. Floor-to-ceiling windows and spacious balconies ensure that the interior is flooded with natural light and enjoys refreshing airflow, enhancing the sense of openness and luxury throughout the home.FacilitiesThe complex is equipped with premium facilities designed to support a seamless and elevated lifestyle. Residents have access to comprehensive security services, including round-the-clock surveillance and controlled access points, ensuring a safe and private environment. The building features a reliable power backup system and a constant, high-quality water supply to maintain uninterrupted daily operations. Additionally, the property includes designated parking for multiple vehicles and is surrounded by well-maintained landscaped areas, which contribute to a clean, serene, and professional living environment that is maintained to the highest standards.LocalitySector 89 is an increasingly sought-after address in Gurgaon, appreciated for its strategic location and clear road connectivity. The locality provides residents with easy access to major arterial routes, including the Dwarka Expressway, which ensures quick and efficient commuting to the corporate hubs of Cyber City and Udyog Vihar. The area is also well-supported by high-quality social infrastructure, including proximity to reputable schools, multispecialty hospitals, and modern shopping complexes. Its combination of planned urban development, serene surroundings, and excellent connectivity to the rest of the National Capital Region makes this apartment an ideal choice for those looking to invest in a lifestyle of convenience and growth.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience comfortable and modern living with this well-maintained 2 BHK apartment in Sector 76, Faridabad. Located in a well-developed residential neighbourhood, this ready-to-move home offers spacious interiors, practical design, and excellent connectivity, making it an ideal choice for families and working professionals seeking a convenient lifestyle in Faridabad.::::Property Specifications::::This semi-furnished apartment features a carpet area of 1050 sq. ft and is situated on the 6th floor of a 17-storey tower. The layout includes 2 spacious bedrooms, 2 attached bathrooms, and 3 balconies, ensuring excellent ventilation and natural light. The large balcony connected to the living room overlooks landscaped gardens, while the other two balconies are attached to the bedrooms. The living and dining area is well-planned and fitted with lights and fans. Both bedrooms come with built-in wardrobes, offering convenient storage solutions. The modular kitchen is equipped with cabinets, chimney, hob, granite platform, and stainless-steel sink, making it functional and stylish. The master bedroom features wooden flooring, while the remaining areas are finished with vitrified tiles for durability and easy maintenance. The apartment is Vaastu compliant and west-facing, creating a bright and comfortable living environment. Both bathrooms are attached to the bedrooms and feature western-style fittings.::::Facilities::::The residence is designed to provide a comfortable and secure lifestyle. It offers 24-hour water supply and 100% power backup through DG support, ensuring uninterrupted daily living. Security is managed through CCTV surveillance and round-the-clock security personnel. The building is equipped with two lifts for convenient access to all floors. One covered parking space is available with the apartment. Residents can also enjoy lifestyle amenities such as a clubhouse and swimming pool, making the community ideal for recreation and relaxation.::::Locality::::Located in Sector 76, the property enjoys excellent access to key facilities and infrastructure. Reputed schools such as DPS School, Manav Rachna School, MVN School, and Shiv Nadar School are located nearby. Leading healthcare facilities including Amrita Hospital, Sarvodaya Hospital, and Accord Hospital are easily accessible. Shopping, dining, and entertainment options are available at Omaxe World Street and other nearby commercial centres. The locality is well-connected through Old Faridabad Railway Station, Ballabgarh Railway Station, Escorts Metro Station, and Ballabgarh Metro Station. Public transport, including buses, taxis, and auto-rickshaws, is readily available, ensuring smooth connectivity across Faridabad and the NCR region. This combination of location, amenities, and connectivity makes the property an excellent residential choice.

resultList.dtldesc: Premium Independent Villa in a Prestigious Gated Community::::Nestled within a well-planned 24-acre gated township in Sector 41, Faridabad, this elegant 4 BHK villa offers a perfect blend of luxury, comfort and connectivity. Strategically located with seamless access to South Delhi, Gurgaon and Noida, the property is ideal for families seeking an upscale lifestyle in a secure and serene environment. With spacious interiors, modern amenities and excellent community facilities, this ready-to-move villa presents an exceptional residential opportunity.::::Property Specifications::::Built on a plot of approximately 165 sq. yd. and offering around 1600 sq. ft. of carpet area, this freehold villa is thoughtfully designed across multiple levels to maximise comfort and functionality. The residence features four spacious bedrooms, five bathrooms and three balconies, ensuring ample space for every family member. A dedicated study room adds flexibility for work, study or personal use.::::The north-east facing orientation and vastu-compliant design allow abundant natural light and ventilation throughout the home. The ground floor accommodates a welcoming guest suite, spacious living areas and a modular kitchen, while the upper floors feature well-appointed bedrooms with private balconies and terrace access. Semi-furnished interiors provide convenience while allowing buyers to personalise the living spaces according to their preferences.::::Premium flooring in granite, marble, vitrified tiles and wood enhances the overall elegance of the residence. The villa overlooks the main road, ensuring easy accessibility and a prominent location within the community.::::Facilities and Amenities::::The property is equipped with 24-hour water supply, substantial water storage capacity and reliable power backup, ensuring uninterrupted daily living. Open parking for two vehicles is available within the premises. A small landscaped lawn at the front and utility space at the rear further enhance the practicality and appeal of the home.::::Residents enjoy access to an impressive range of lifestyle amenities, including a large central park, multiple landscaped gardens, a swimming pool, clubhouse, tennis court and badminton facilities. The secure gated environment offers a peaceful and family-friendly atmosphere.::::Locality Advantages::::Sector 41 is one of Faridabad's most desirable residential locations, known for its excellent infrastructure and connectivity. The property enjoys convenient access to reputed schools, hospitals, shopping centres, business districts and everyday conveniences. Its strategic position provides smooth connectivity to South Delhi, Gurgaon and Noida, making it an ideal choice for professionals and families alike.::::Combining spacious living areas, premium amenities, freehold ownership and a prime location, this 4 BHK villa offers an outstanding opportunity to own a luxurious home in one of Faridabad's most prestigious residential communities.
